IN ADDITION, THE COURT HAS YET TO RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE THE OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/AJR
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S RE-NOTICE OF MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDER DENYING MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDER DENYING MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP 1008. DEFENDANT DOES NOT CITE ANY NEW LAW, FACTS, OR CIRCUMSTANCES THAT WARRANT RECONSIDERATION. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE DECLARATION REQUIREMENT OF CCP 1008. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Denying Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: appearance by appellant, saeed ibrahim. no appearance by respondent's attorney. matter submitted.

Denying Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Continued To Sep-16-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 622

Re-Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant SAEED IBRAHIM, Tel No. 415-448-7419 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defendant did not properly notify the Court and the opposing side of his intent to appear today to argue against the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is denied. Defendant fails to comply with CCP 1008. Defendant does not cite any new law, facts, or circumstances that warrant reconsideration. In addition, defendant failed to comply with the declaration requirement of CCP 1008. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Re-Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Continued To Oct-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM's Re-Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is continued until October 14, 2015, to be heard by Judge Goldsmith. In addition, the court has yet to receive a courtesy copy of the opposition in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ajr

Re-Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Continued To Oct-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is continued to October 1, 2015, to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 26, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Suazanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/sb

Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is off calendar. A re-notice was filed on June 24, 2015, setting the hearing on August 26, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, of Law Offices of Robert F. Cohen, Tel. 800.492.2657, for plaintiffs;
Saeed Ibrahim, in pro se, Tel. 415.445.7419, for defendants.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT SAEED IBRAHIM'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is denied. Defendant was served and service of process was proper and no proposed answer was attached to the motion. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.
